name: bls_series
description: Bureau of Labor Statistics time series data. Well-known series: CUUR0000SA0 (CPI-U All Items NSA), CUSR0000SA0 (CPI-U SA), LNS14000000 (Unemployment Rate SA), CES0000000001 (Total Nonfarm Payrolls), WPUFD49104 (PPI Final Demand). Use BLS series IDs directly for other series.

series_id.description: BLS series ID (e.g. CUUR0000SA0 for CPI-U)
